tools.name: detect_pii
tools.description: Detect personally identifiable information (email, phone, SSN, credit card, IP, URL, API key) in a text string.

tools.name: redact_pii
tools.description: Redact PII from text. mode=mask replaces with [REDACTED]; mode=tag uses typed placeholders like [EMAIL].

tools.name: check_safety
tools.description: Check text for harmful content using weighted keyword detection. Returns a 0–1 score and verdict (safe/caution/unsafe).

tools.name: check_hallucination
tools.description: Heuristic scoring of LLM hedge phrases that correlate with hallucinated outputs. Returns score 0–1 and risk level.

tools.name: full_check
tools.description: Run pii, safety, and/or hallucination checks in one call. Default: pii + safety. Specify checks=["pii","safety","hallucination"] to run all.
